description: Analyze legacy commercial and PDR transition in San Francisco by computing a 'Transition Index' identifying zones where new residential development is encroaching on legacy non-residential space. Using the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/neighborhood_transition.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, calculate the transition_index for zones meeting the criteria of legacy_nonres_sqft (buildings built before 1980) >= 50,000 and new_res_units (buildings built in or after 2000) >= 50. The index is defined as new_res_units / (legacy_nonres_sqft / 1000.0). Save the top 15 zones sorted descending by transition_index to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/transitioning_zones.csv with columns for zone_id, legacy_nonres_sqft, new_res_units, and transition_index. Generate a scatter plot visualizing legacy_nonres_sqft vs. new_res_units for all filtered zones, highlighting the top 15 zones, and save the result to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/transition_scatter.png.
